And one more gopi said that to look at the birds, they are sitting on the branches and the ticks of the tree, to hear the transcendental vibration of the fruit of Krishna.

And they have forgotten everything. And they heard sound of Krishna. When Krishna played the flute, all attentively hearing the sound of the fruit of Krishna. And when Yamuna river hears the sound of nectarine fruit of Krishna, immediately she want to embrace the lotus feet of Krishna.
And she would break her waves and bring the water and along with the flowers in her hand, lotus flowers and offer to Krishna. Even the water, trees.
All the moving and non moving items or creatures would hear Krishna because Krishna was so attractive. Krishna performed so wonderful pastimes.

play their transcendental flute, even all the non-moving creature and the non-moving creature

and the entire bodies because the dust is touched by the lotus footprint of Krishna.
So while Krishna was tending the cows in the forest of Vrindavana or Govardhana hill,
the gopis in the home, in their village, they were always absorbed in Krishna.
They do not know any other thing other than Krishna, thinking of Krishna,
They were completely absorbed in Krishna. This is called Krishna consciousness.
Somehow or the other, one should fix his mind upon Krishna. So the gopis are the perfect example
how to remain in Krishna consciousness always. Although they were not educated, they were not
born in a Brahmin family, but nonetheless they remained in Krishna consciousness. Therefore,
there is no worship that is better than the method that was adopted by the gopis.
No one can worship Krishna other than the method adopted by the gopis. So the gopis'
method of worshiping Krishna is the topmost. Chaitanya Mahaprabhu declared this.
So when Krishna performed these wonderful pastimes, he could attract all the people's attention.
They all became devotees of our Lord and they went back home, back to Godhead.
Therefore, Kunti adored this particular incarnation of Krishna,
his most merciful among all other incarnations because in this incarnation,

other incarnations. And last point, Prabhupāda says here that Kṛṣṇa is called Govinda because

in the end. So every day we offer a prayer to Lord.

means He is the enlivener of cows and the senses. So it is the duty of everyone to protect

to offer them as sacrifice. That time, Mahārāja Yūśrā wanted to perform Rājusya sacrifice.

we conquer Jarāsanda, we will have nothing. So in the past, our King, Krishna, was his

That Krishna assured him, don't worry, we'll conquer. Bhima can kill him by my mercy.
So he took all of them. Oh, Krishna took Bhima and Arjuna and they disguised as Brahmanas.
And they entered the kingdom of Jarasandha through back door entry, not front door entry.
So it is a custom of Jarasandha that you would give charity to Brahmanas, whatever they would ask for.
If the Brahmanas would ask, cut off his own body, you would give without fail.
Just imagine, although he was a demon, you would never show disrespect to any Brahmana.
So three of them appeared and told, Jarasandha, we want something from you.
That I am Krishna, he is Bhima and he is Arjuna.
Now we want to, charity of fighting with you.
So, even though he was a demon, still he would give charity, protect Brahmanas and cows.
This is the position of Jarasandha.
And take for another example, Karna.

he was adorned with dazzling armours, body armour, bodily armour, and earrings.

He was always thinking, I have to kill Arjuna.
He was always thinking of killing Arjuna.

At that moment Indra approached Karna. My dear Karna, you are well known for giving charity to Brahmas. I know very well. So I beg you, he asked, what do you want? I beg you, please give your armor and earring.

Because it was integral part of the body of Karna. It's not like something we are wearing separate to give and take and give to him. It's an integral part of the body. Even the earring was integral part of the body of Karna.
When he asked, he could not refuse. Because although he knew that he is Indra, nonetheless he accepted the form of Brahmana.
he took a sword and cut the body and removed his natural armor and cut air some portion and gave the earring to Indra.
Because he came in the form of Brahmana. Although, when he cut the body and removed his armor, entire body started, blood started oozing out from the body.
And he knew very well that his life would be in danger,
He did not have this armor. Still, he gave this armor in charity to Indra because he accepted the form of a Brahmana.
So the moment he did, even the devatas showered the flowers upon Karna. This is the position of Karna.
Although he was taking part in the side of Duryodhana, still he knew very well that to give protection to Brahmana, to give charity to Brahmana, to give protection to cows,
and Bhalimaharaj, when Lord Vamanadeva approached Bhalimaharaj in the form of a Brahmana, he asked for charity, three steps according to the measurement of Lord.

He asked for charity. My dear Bhalimaharaj, I knew that you will not refuse charity to any Brahmanas. Therefore, I beg you, give me small land, three steps of land, but according to the measurement of my steps.
So he said, okay, please take. That time, Shukaracharya came and told, you rascal, how can you do this promise to him?
He said, no problem. He said, no problem. Even though he took part or he sided with my enemies, still he has come in the form of a Brahmana. Therefore, I cannot refuse giving charity to him.
Vamanadeva, so Vamanadeva took everything. He knew very well. He knew very well that Vamanadeva will take away all things. Still, he gave and became a servant of Lord.

When they got married to Draupadi, five of them, Pandavas got married to Draupadi, they do not want one fight for one wife.
Therefore, they consulted with Maharaja Narada. Give me the solution. How can we be peaceful? Because we married one common wife.
That time, they proposed one plan.
As long as Draupadi is with one person, other person should not enter the room and see Draupadi and other person, other brothers.

This was the decision made. If somebody sees, in that situation, should retire to forest for twelve years, if somebody sees Draupadi with another husband, they are talking together in a solitude place, he should retire to the forest for twelve years.
The order was made among the brothers.
They proposed the plan to Narada. Narada approved.

When Krishna disappeared during the Rasalila, they prayed a wonderful prayer to Krishna.
Tavakathamrthum, Taptajivanum, Kavibiridithum, Kalmashapaham, Shavanamangalam, Srimathadathum, Bhuvigrananthiyai, Bhuridhajanaha.
Tavakathamrthum, O Lord, your words are nectar.
Katha, your transcendental narration of your activities are nectar.
Taptajivanum is the life and soul of those who are suffering in this material world.
Krishna's pastimes and merits are the life and soul of those who are suffering in this material world.
And one who hears this katha, Krishna katha, from the mouth of Kavibi, the devotees of the Lord,
Bestows all the good fortune upon anyone who hears the transcendental narration of the Lord.
And this transcendental description of the Lord are filled with spiritual potency.
And the one who broadcasts this transcendental description of the Lord are called more munificent.
And the one who wants to become munificent, what should do, should take up Krishna consciousness and practice Krishna consciousness and preach this message to the world.
When the leaders of the world become Krishna consciousness, then there is a peace and prosperity.
If we do this activity, then Krishna will be pleased.
When Krishna is pleased, everyone is pleased.
That should be the goal of our life.
Therefore, should all practice Krishna consciousness very seriously and take this message and propagate everywhere.
So that everyone can take up Krishna consciousness and everyone can live happily and after the end of life, everyone can go back home, back to Godhead.
